title: Mauritius Budget Explorer
description: Discover the natural wonders of Mauritius without breaking the bank. This budget-friendly itinerary covers the island's iconic highlights including the famous Seven Coloured Earths, Blue Bay Marine Park, and the vibrant Port Louis markets. Comfortable guesthouses and local dining ensure an authentic Mauritian experience at an affordable price.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in 3-star guesthouses or budget hotels
Daily breakfast included
Airport transfers by shared shuttle
Guided day tour to Chamarel and Black River Gorges
Visa assistance and documentation support

days.title: Arrival & Port Louis Discovery
days.image: Port Louis Mauritius harbour waterfront Le Caudan shopping district
activities: Arrive at Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport and transfer to Port Louis hotel (approx. 45 mins)
Afternoon stroll through Le Caudan Waterfront – enjoy harbour views, local craft shops, and street snacks
Evening visit to Port Louis Central Market for fresh tropical fruits and spices; dinner at a local Creole restaurant

days.title: Port Louis Heritage & Pamplemousses
days.image: Pamplemousses Botanical Garden giant Victoria amazonica water lilies Mauritius
activities: Morning visit to Aapravasi Ghat UNESCO World Heritage Site and Blue Penny Museum (9:00 AM – 11:30 AM)
Afternoon tour of Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Botanical Garden in Pamplemousses – giant water lilies, spice gardens, and deer park
Return to hotel by evening; dinner at a local Indian-Creole fusion restaurant near Trou aux Biches

days.title: Chamarel & Black River Gorges
days.image: Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths Mauritius volcanic dunes rainbow colours
activities: Early morning drive to Black River Gorges National Park – nature trail spotting endemic birds and tropical flora (8:00 AM – 10:30 AM)
Visit the spectacular Seven Coloured Earths at Chamarel and nearby Chamarel Waterfall (11:00 AM – 1:00 PM)
Afternoon stop at Chamarel Rum Distillery for a free tasting tour before returning to hotel

days.title: Blue Bay Marine Park & Mahebourg
days.image: Blue Bay Marine Park Mauritius coral reef snorkeling crystal clear turquoise water
activities: Full morning at Blue Bay Marine Park – snorkeling over vibrant coral reefs, spotting tropical fish and sea turtles (8:30 AM – 12:00 PM)
Lunch at a beachside shack in Mahebourg; afternoon visit to the SSR Sugar Museum to learn about Mauritius's colonial sugar heritage
Sunset walk along Mahebourg waterfront promenade before heading back to hotel

days.title: Grand Baie & Departure
days.image: Grand Baie Mauritius beach resort turquoise lagoon white sand
activities: Morning leisure at Grand Baie beach – swimming and relaxing on white sand (8:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Quick visit to Grand Baie market for last-minute souvenir shopping
Transfer to airport for departure flight; check-in and farewell to Mauritius

title: Mauritius Family Fun Package
description: Create unforgettable family memories in the paradise island of Mauritius. From thrilling water sports at Île aux Cerfs to adventure activities at Casela World of Adventures, this package is designed to keep every family member entertained and delighted. Stay in comfortable family-friendly resorts with pools and kids' facilities.
inclusions: 5 nights in 4-star family resort with pool access
Daily breakfast and dinner (half-board basis)
Private airport transfers for the whole family
Full-day boat trip to Île aux Cerfs with BBQ lunch included
Entry tickets to Casela World of Adventures and visa assistance
exclusions: Personal expenses, extra water sports, and shopping

days.title: Arrival & Beach Resort Check-In
days.image: Mauritius family beach resort swimming pool tropical garden children playing
activities: Arrive at SSR International Airport; private family transfer to Trou aux Biches or Flic en Flac resort (approx. 1 hour)
Check in, settle into family rooms; kids enjoy the resort pool while adults relax on the beach
Welcome dinner at resort restaurant with Creole buffet spread

days.title: Casela World of Adventures
days.image: Casela World of Adventures Mauritius zip line safari lions giraffes children
activities: Full day at Casela World of Adventures – zip-lining, quad biking, and walking with lions for older kids (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM)
Afternoon visit to the park's bird sanctuary and giraffe feeding station, perfect for younger children
Evening return to resort; relaxed dinner and early rest

days.title: Île aux Cerfs Island Day Trip
days.image: Ile aux Cerfs Mauritius turquoise lagoon boat trip water sports parasailing
activities: Morning boat trip to Île aux Cerfs – snorkeling, glass-bottom boat ride over coral reefs (8:30 AM – 1:00 PM)
BBQ lunch on the island beach; afternoon water sports – banana boat, parasailing options for teens
Sunset boat return; evening free for family games and resort activities

days.title: Chamarel & Rum Distillery
days.image: Chamarel Mauritius Seven Coloured Earths volcanic landscape waterfall scenic
activities: Morning drive to Chamarel – visit the iconic Seven Coloured Earths geological phenomenon (9:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Stop at Chamarel Waterfall viewpoint and Chamarel Rum Distillery for a family-friendly tour
Afternoon at Flic en Flac beach for swimming; return to resort for half-board dinner

days.title: Pamplemousses & Port Louis
days.image: Port Louis Mauritius Central Market colourful spices fruits local vendors
activities: Morning visit to Pamplemousses Botanical Garden – giant tortoises, water lilies, and spice trees (8:30 AM – 11:00 AM)
Afternoon in Port Louis – Blue Penny Museum and Le Caudan Waterfront for shopping and street food
Sunset dinner cruise on Port Louis harbour (optional add-on)

days.title: Beach Morning & Departure
days.image: Mauritius turquoise beach sunrise palm trees golden sand family vacation
activities: Leisurely morning on the beach; hotel pool time for final family swim (7:00 AM – 10:00 AM)
Check out and souvenirs shopping at nearest local market
Private transfer to SSR International Airport for departure flight

title: Mauritius Romantic Honeymoon Escape
description: Celebrate your love in one of the world's most romantic destinations. This honeymoon package features luxurious beachfront villa accommodation, private sunset cruises around Le Morne Brabant, and intimate dining under the stars. Every detail is curated to create the most magical start to your married life.
inclusions: 5 nights in 5-star beachfront resort with ocean-view room or villa
Daily breakfast and one candlelit dinner included
Private airport transfers with welcome flowers and champagne
Sunset catamaran cruise with dolphin watching near Le Morne
Couples spa treatment (60-min) and visa assistance
exclusions: Additional spa treatments and personal shopping

days.title: Arrival & Romantic Welcome
days.image: Mauritius luxury beachfront villa overwater bungalow couple sunset champagne
activities: Arrive at SSR Airport; private chauffeur transfer to Le Morne or Black River resort with flower garlands and chilled champagne
Check in to ocean-view villa; private beach welcome – rose petals, candles, and evening hors d'oeuvres
Romantic candlelit dinner at the resort's signature restaurant overlooking the Indian Ocean

days.title: Le Morne & Underwater Waterfall
days.image: Le Morne Brabant Mauritius UNESCO mountain lagoon underwater waterfall illusion aerial
activities: Morning helicopter or speed boat trip to view the stunning Underwater Waterfall optical illusion off Le Morne Brabant peninsula
Hike around the base of Le Morne Brabant UNESCO World Heritage mountain with scenic Indian Ocean views
Sunset champagne picnic on a secluded beach near the lagoon

days.title: Sunset Catamaran Cruise & Dolphins
days.image: Mauritius catamaran sunset cruise dolphins couple ocean turquoise lagoon
activities: Morning leisure at the resort beach; couples breakfast in bed option
Afternoon private catamaran cruise – snorkeling at coral reefs, swimming with wild spinner dolphins in their natural habitat
Sundowner cocktails on the catamaran as the sun sets over the Indian Ocean horizon

days.title: Chamarel Scenic Drive & Spa
days.image: Chamarel Mauritius couple scenic mountain drive tropical forest waterfall
activities: Scenic morning drive to Chamarel – Seven Coloured Earths, waterfall viewpoint, and local rum tasting (9:00 AM – 1:00 PM)
Return to resort for a relaxing couples spa treatment – hot stone massage or Creole herbal ritual
Private dinner on the beach with live acoustic music and star-filled sky

days.title: Blue Bay Coral Reef & Grand Baie
days.image: Blue Bay Marine Park Mauritius couple snorkeling coral reef tropical fish
activities: Morning glass-bottom boat tour over Blue Bay Marine Park – marvel at pristine coral gardens and sea turtles
Afternoon drive north to Grand Baie – couples' shopping, beachside café, and sunset cocktails
Farewell romantic dinner at a beachfront restaurant in Grand Baie

days.title: Leisure Morning & Departure
days.image: Mauritius sunrise beach couple footprints sand Indian Ocean farewell
activities: Final sunrise beach walk holding hands; in-room breakfast served to your villa
Late check-out if available; last dip in the resort pool or beach
Private chauffeur transfer to SSR International Airport with warm send-off

title: Mauritius Adventure Rush
description: For thrill-seekers, Mauritius offers so much more than beaches. This adventure package packs in kite surfing at Le Morne, canyoning in the lush Black River Gorges, deep-sea fishing in the Indian Ocean, and quad biking through volcanic terrains. Get your adrenaline pumping in one of the world's most beautiful settings.
inclusions: 5 nights in comfortable 3-star adventure lodge near Black River
Daily breakfast included
Airport transfers by private vehicle
Guided canyoning experience in Black River Gorges (full day)
Deep-sea fishing half-day trip and visa assistance
exclusions: Personal adventure gear rentals not included in package

days.title: Arrival & Kite Surf Introduction
days.image: Le Morne Mauritius kite surfing turquoise lagoon extreme sports beach
activities: Arrive at SSR Airport; transfer to Black River area lodge (approx. 1.5 hours)
Afternoon beginner kite surfing lesson at Le Morne lagoon with certified IKO instructor (2:00 PM – 5:00 PM)
Evening briefing for the week's adventure activities; dinner at local seafood grill

days.title: Canyoning in Black River Gorges
days.image: Black River Gorges Mauritius canyoning waterfall rappelling lush tropical forest
activities: Full-day guided canyoning experience through Black River Gorges – rappelling down waterfalls, cliff jumping, and jungle trekking (7:00 AM – 4:00 PM)
Picnic lunch packed by the lodge on a rocky outcrop beside a natural pool
Evening stretching and recovery; hearty dinner at the lodge

days.title: Deep-Sea Fishing & Snorkeling
days.image: Mauritius deep sea fishing boat Indian Ocean marlin tuna sunrise
activities: Early morning deep-sea fishing expedition from Black River harbour – targeting marlin, tuna, and dorado (5:30 AM – 12:00 PM)
Afternoon snorkeling at Crystal Rock near Grand Baie – crystal-clear waters teeming with tropical fish
Beach bonfire evening with freshly cooked catch of the day

days.title: Quad Biking & Zip-Lining at Casela
days.image: Casela Mauritius quad biking adventure park volcanic terrain thrill
activities: Morning quad biking through sugarcane fields and volcanic terrain in the Black River region (8:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Afternoon at Casela World of Adventures – zip-lining, abseiling, and canyon swing (1:00 PM – 5:00 PM)
Adrenaline debrief over cold beers at a local beach bar

days.title: Île aux Cerfs Water Sports Blitz
days.image: Ile aux Cerfs Mauritius water sports jet ski wakeboard parasailing lagoon
activities: Boat trip to Île aux Cerfs island – full morning of water sports: jet skiing, wakeboarding, and parasailing (8:30 AM – 1:00 PM)
Lunch on the island; afternoon glass-bottom boat tour over coral reefs
Return by speedboat; sunset run along the beach trail

days.title: Hiking & Departure
days.image: Mauritius mountain hiking trail scenic ocean view birds Black River Gorges
activities: Morning sunrise hike in Black River Gorges – Macchabée Trail with endemic bird spotting (5:30 AM – 9:00 AM)
Return to lodge; shower, pack, and check out
Transfer to SSR International Airport for departure flight

title: Mauritius Ultra-Luxury Retreat
description: Experience Mauritius at its most exclusive – private villa resorts, helicopter transfers, bespoke dining on sandbanks, and private yacht charters around the island's most pristine lagoons. This meticulously crafted luxury itinerary leaves nothing to chance, ensuring every moment is extraordinary and every experience is one of a kind.
inclusions: 6 nights in 5-star luxury villa resort with private plunge pool and butler service
Full-board (breakfast, lunch, and dinner) at resort and curated restaurants
Private helicopter transfer from airport to resort
Private yacht charter for full-day lagoon cruise with gourmet lunch
Couples spa day and visa concierge service
exclusions: International business/first class flights to/from Mauritius
Premium wine cellar and personal shopping

days.title: Helicopter Arrival & Private Villa
days.image: Mauritius luxury resort private villa plunge pool Indian Ocean aerial view helicopter
activities: VIP fast-track arrival at SSR Airport; private helicopter transfer offering aerial views of the island's lagoons and mountains (30-min flight)
Check in to private villa suite with dedicated butler; welcome fruit platter, rum cocktail, and rose petal turndown service
Private candlelit dinner on the villa terrace prepared by in-villa chef

days.title: Private Yacht Charter
days.image: Mauritius private yacht charter luxury sunset catamaran coral lagoon turquoise
activities: Full-day private yacht charter circumnavigating the island's southern coast – dolphin watching and snorkeling at pristine reefs (8:00 AM – 5:00 PM)
Gourmet lunch served on board by private chef – fresh lobster, ceviche, and chilled Chablis
Sunset champagne as the yacht anchors at an isolated sandbank

days.title: Le Morne & Underwater Waterfall by Helicopter
days.image: Mauritius underwater waterfall aerial helicopter view Le Morne Brabant luxury tour
activities: Private helicopter excursion over Le Morne Brabant and the famous Underwater Waterfall illusion – with aerial photography service (9:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Exclusive access to a private beach at Le Morne for a gourmet picnic lunch
Afternoon in-villa spa: traditional Ayurvedic full-body treatment and aromatherapy

days.title: Île aux Cerfs by Speedboat & Golf
days.image: Ile aux Cerfs Mauritius golf course ocean view luxury resort tropical
activities: Private speedboat to Île aux Cerfs – exclusive beach cabana with butler service, snorkeling, and paddleboard (8:30 AM – 1:00 PM)
Afternoon tee time at Île aux Cerfs Golf Course – 18-hole championship course overlooking the turquoise lagoon
Return at sunset; fine dining at the resort's gourmet seafood restaurant

days.title: Cultural Immersion & Rum Estate
days.image: Mauritius luxury rum estate private tour colonial estate Chamarel rolling hills
activities: Private guided tour of Chamarel Rum Distillery with a premium tasting masterclass and lunch at the estate restaurant
Visit to Pamplemousses Botanical Garden with a private botanist guide (11:00 AM – 1:00 PM)
Evening visit to Le Caudan Waterfront for designer shopping; sunset dinner cruise on Port Louis harbour

days.title: Spa Day & Sunset Sandbank Dinner
days.image: Mauritius luxury spa couple overwater bungalow sunset sandbank private dining ocean
activities: Full-morning resort spa day: hot stone massage, hydrotherapy bath, and facial with premium L'Occitane products
Leisurely afternoon at the private beach; water villa afternoon tea service
Exclusive sunset dinner arranged on a private sandbank – live Sega music, lanterns, and chef-prepared 5-course tasting menu

days.title: Final Luxury Morning & Departure
days.image: Mauritius sunrise Indian Ocean luxury villa pool champagne breakfast farewell
activities: In-villa gourmet breakfast with Indian Ocean sunrise views; final dip in private plunge pool
Late check-out at 2 PM; butler assists with packing and luggage handling
Private helicopter or luxury chauffeur transfer to SSR International Airport for departure

title: Mauritius Cultural Heritage Journey
description: Dive deep into the rich multicultural tapestry of Mauritius – a unique blend of African, Indian, French, and Chinese influences. Visit UNESCO World Heritage Sites, explore colonial plantations, sample Creole cuisine at local markets, and witness traditional Sega dance performances. This journey is for the culturally curious traveller.
inclusions: 4 nights in a heritage boutique hotel in Port Louis or Mahebourg
Daily breakfast and two cultural Creole dinners
Private air-conditioned vehicle with local guide for all tours
Entry tickets to Aapravasi Ghat, Blue Penny Museum, and SSR Sugar Museum
Traditional Sega dance cultural show ticket and visa assistance
exclusions: Personal shopping and tips for guides

days.title: Arrival & Port Louis Heritage Walk
days.image: Port Louis Mauritius Aapravasi Ghat UNESCO World Heritage colonial waterfront
activities: Arrive at SSR Airport; private transfer to boutique hotel in Port Louis (45 mins)
Guided heritage walk through Port Louis – Aapravasi Ghat UNESCO Site (the first indentured labour immigration depot), Government House, and St Louis Cathedral
Evening at Port Louis Central Market for a Creole street food experience – dholl puri, gato piment, and alouda

days.title: Blue Penny Museum & Pamplemousses
days.image: Blue Penny Museum Mauritius stamp collection colonial history exhibits
activities: Morning visit to the Blue Penny Museum – world-renowned for rare stamps and Mauritian colonial history exhibits (9:00 AM – 12:00 PM)
Afternoon at Pamplemousses Botanical Garden – one of the oldest botanical gardens in the southern hemisphere, established in 1736
Evening Sega dance cultural show at a local cultural centre – witness the vibrant African-Creole heritage dance

days.title: SSR Sugar Museum & Mahebourg
days.image: Mauritius sugar cane plantation SSR Sugar Museum colonial history grinding mill
activities: Morning visit to the SSR Sugar Museum at L'Aventure du Sucre – learn about 400 years of sugarcane history in Mauritius with interactive exhibits (9:00 AM – 12:00 PM)
Lunch at a Mauritian family table (table d'hôte) for authentic home-cooked Creole cuisine
Afternoon at Mahebourg Historical Museum and waterfront promenade – overlooking the scene of the 1810 Battle of Grand Port

days.title: Chamarel Village & Creole Cooking
days.image: Chamarel Mauritius Creole village cooking class cultural heritage traditional food
activities: Morning drive to Chamarel village – explore the Rhumerie de Chamarel estate and learn about traditional rum production methods
Hands-on Creole cooking class with a local family – prepare rougaille, briani, and coconut chutney
Evening cultural walk through Floréal area – exploring Mauritian Chinese and Tamil community temples

days.title: Local Markets & Departure
days.image: Mauritius local market artisan crafts basket weaving cultural souvenirs colourful
activities: Morning visit to Quatre Bornes craft market for handmade Mauritian baskets, model ships, and Creole spice kits
Final breakfast at a traditional Mauritian Dholl Puri roadside vendor
Transfer to SSR International Airport; depart with memories of Mauritius's extraordinary cultural mosaic

title: Mauritius Weekend Beach Escape
description: When time is short but the need for a tropical escape is urgent, this Mauritius weekend getaway delivers maximum relaxation and stunning scenery in just four days. Lounge on pristine beaches, snorkel clear lagoons, and sample fresh seafood before heading home refreshed and rejuvenated.
inclusions: 3 nights in 4-star beachfront hotel with sea view room
Daily breakfast and one beachside dinner
Private airport transfers both ways
Half-day glass-bottom boat tour over Blue Bay coral reef
Visa assistance and welcome beach kit (sunscreen, snorkel set)

days.title: Arrival & Trou aux Biches
days.image: Trou aux Biches Mauritius turquoise lagoon white sand beach sunset palm trees
activities: Arrive at SSR Airport; private transfer to Trou aux Biches or Flic en Flac beachfront hotel (1 hour)
Afternoon on the beach – swimming in the sheltered turquoise lagoon; cocktails at the beach bar
Sunset dinner at a beachfront Creole restaurant – fresh grilled fish and lobster

days.title: Blue Bay & Île aux Cerfs Highlights
days.image: Mauritius Blue Bay coral reef glass bottom boat snorkeling tropical marine life
activities: Morning glass-bottom boat tour over Blue Bay Marine Park – incredible coral formations and colourful marine life (8:30 AM – 11:30 AM)
Quick boat excursion to Île aux Cerfs for an afternoon beach picnic and paddleboarding
Return to hotel; evening free for resort pool and relaxation

days.title: Chamarel Quick Tour & Grand Baie
days.image: Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths Mauritius scenic overlook bright rainbow soil formations
activities: Morning scenic drive to Chamarel Seven Coloured Earths for iconic photos (8:30 AM – 11:00 AM)
Afternoon in Grand Baie – beach time, local shopping, and a cold coconut on the shore
Dinner at a Grand Baie seafood restaurant overlooking the beach

days.title: Final Beach Morning & Departure
days.image: Mauritius tropical beach sunrise final day farewell golden sand Indian Ocean
activities: Early morning swim before breakfast; last photographs on the beach (6:30 AM – 8:30 AM)
Hotel check-out; souvenir shopping at Le Caudan Waterfront in Port Louis
Private transfer to SSR International Airport for departure flight
